prompt: Photorealistic, high-resolution editorial portrait of a well-groomed man seated on a low mid-century wooden lounge chair in a minimalist studio with a soft neutral off-white backdrop. He wears a pale sky-blue linen button-down shirt with sleeves casually rolled to the forearms, tailored white slim trousers cropped at the ankle, and woven tan slip-on espadrine-style shoes with white soles, no socks. Composition centered, three-quarter body shot, relaxed confident pose with hands loosely clasped, legs apart, head turned slightly off-camera, calm expressive face, neat short hair, natural skin tones with fine texture, crisp fabric detail, visible linen weave and wood grain, minimal props, modern lifestyle fashion aesthetic, elegant, airy, sophisticated mood.
